industry.secondary_domain: Supply Chain Traceability and Packaging Intelligence

about: Linksmart Technologies is an intellectual property-driven technology company focused on developing non-clonable product security and anti-counterfeiting solutions. The company specializes in securing high-value goods and complex supply chains through advanced authentication technologies.

core_technology.description: smartDNA is a patented, non-clonable security labeling technology that generates unique, tamper-evident signatures for each product. It enables authentication using smartphone-based scanning and automated digital verification systems.

solutions.description: Unique, trackable labels embedded with proprietary authentication patterns.
Packaging solutions designed to detect tampering and prevent unauthorized reuse.
Security-enabled reusable packaging systems with verification layers.
Licensing of proprietary smartDNA technology for enterprise integration.
